steps.t: A pitcher of ale can be found at Gimli's table in Merethrond in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). Gimli has asked you to drink with him as he shares his plans…
Gimli can be found in Merethrond in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). You have shared a drink with Gimli and should now listen to him.
A pitcher of ale can be found at Gimli's table in Merethrond in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). Gimli has again asked you to drink with him as he shares his…
Gimli can be found in Merethrond in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). You have shared another drink with Gimli and should again listen to him.
Gimli can be found in Merethrond in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). Gimli has finished telling of his plans for the comings days, but it seems he wishes to …
Galadriel can be found in Merethrond in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). Gimli has asked you to speak to Galadriel on his behalf and see if she might wish to…
Gimli can be found in Merethrond in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). Although seemingly flattered, Galadriel has politely declined Gimli's invitation. Howeve…
